## 🤖 AI Contribution

### Involvement Level
- [ ] 🤖 Fully AI-generated (100% AI, 0% Human)

- [ ] 🐛 Debugging / root-cause analysis
- [ ] 🧪 Test generation
- [ ] 📖 Documentation writing
- [ ] 🔍 Code review / suggestions
- [ ] 🌐 Translation

### Parts of the Codebase Affected by AI

- [ ] Tests

### Human Oversight
